sql_array: CREATE TABLE employee(`first_name` String, `last_name` String, `salary` UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY salary;
UPDATE employee SET salary = salary + 5000 WHERE first_name = 'John';
SELECT concatAssumeInjective(first_name, ' ', last_name) AS full_name, sum(salary) FROM employee GROUP BY concatAssumeInjective(first_name, last_name);
SELECT full_name, sum(salary) FROM (SELECT concatAssumeInjective(first_name, ' ', last_name) AS full_name, salary FROM employee) GROUP BY full_name;
